Notes: Evidence sheet: logs/render-quality/pass-one-triage-20260703/remaining/pdfjs_issue13520.pdf-p1-sheet.png. Prior PAGE_BOX_REFERENCE_DISAGREEMENT contract was stale; pdfinfo confirms CropBox is tight, but the remaining difference is color/composite semantics.

Target.Reason: MuPDF is the best target for the CropBox render and does not show the pdfe right-side dark soft-mask/composite artifact.

1.QualityReason: Real visible rendering issue: CMYK transparency group with /BM /Screen and luminosity soft masks renders too dark on the right side in pdfe.

QualityReason: Reviewed 2026-07-03: current sheet shows a real visible CMYK transparency/soft-mask artifact on the right side of the form. pdfe preserves page extent but does not match the accepted MuPDF target.

Target.Reason: MuPDF renders the full CropBox extent without the dark right-side CMYK transparency artifact; Poppler/Ghostscript use a smaller apparent extent and are less useful targets for this page.
